title: Concise TerraYield frontend performance diagnosis
note: Concise non-destructive frontend performance diagnosis. Wait 2 minutes before writing devam et.
command:
Write-Output 'TASK: Kisa frontend performans tanilama'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 25%'; Write-Output 'TIME:'; Get-Date; Write-Output 'ROOT:'; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object -First 40 Name,Mode,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output 'PACKAGES:'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter package.json | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Select-Object -First 10 FullName,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output 'TOP_FRONTEND_FILES:'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.js,*.jsx,*.ts,*.tsx,*.css | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 FullName,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output 'API_CALL_CANDIDATES:'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Include *.js,*.jsx,*.ts,*.tsx | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '
ode_modules\|\.git\|\.aays_next_fix\|\dist\| uild' } | Select-String -Pattern 'fetch\(|axios|/map/listings|sales-history|external-evidence|parcels|combined|useEffect|mapbox|leaflet|debounce|throttle' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 60 | ForEach-Object { $_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ': ' + $_.Line.Trim() }; Write-Output 'API_RESPONSE_SIZES:'; foreach ($ep in @('/map/listings','/map/sales-history/external-evidence','/map/sales-history/combined')) { try { $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ('http://localhost:8010' + $ep) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 45; $sw.Stop(); Write-Output ('API ' + $ep + ' status=' + $r.StatusCode + ' ms=' + $sw.ElapsedMilliseconds + ' bytes=' + $r.Content.Length) } catch { Write-Output ('API_FAIL ' + $ep + ' error=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output 'FRONTEND_PERF_QUICK_DONE'
